    A

    absolute(double) - Static method in class example.math.MathTools
    Returns the absolute value of a number.

    E

    example.math - package example.math
     

    F

    factorial(int) - Static method in class example.math.MathTools
    Calculates the factorial of a given number.

    G

    gcd(int, int) - Static method in class example.math.MathTools
    Computes the greatest common divisor (GCD) of two integers.

    I

    isPrime(int) - Static method in class example.math.MathTools
    Checks if a given number is prime.

    M

    MathTools - Class in example.math
    A utility class that provides common mathematical operations.
    MathTools() - Constructor for class example.math.MathTools
     

    P

    power(double, int) - Static method in class example.math.MathTools
    Computes the value of base raised to the power of exponent.
